/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -fopenmp -fopenmp -msse -msse2 -msse3 -msse4 -msse4.1 -msse4.2 -O2 -DNDEBUG -fopenmp -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/livox_interfaces2__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/livox_ros_driver2/msg/custom_point__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/livox_interfaces2__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/livox_ros_driver2/msg/custom_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chen/sentry_try/sentry_ws/build/lightning/thirdparty/livox_ros_driver:/opt/ros/humble/lib: liblivox_ros_driver2__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
